title: DevOps Engineer
description:
**Är du en vass DevOps Engineer med passion för automation, moln och moderna arbetssätt? Vill du arbeta i en innovativ miljö där teknik och teamwork står i högsta fokus? Om du älskar att effektivisera processer, bygga robusta CI/CD-pipelines och skapa smarta lösningar som gör skillnad – då vill vi höra från dig!** 




  





 Vi på SDNit är ett team av experter inom SecOps, NetOps, DevOps och IT Management. Vi brinner för att överbrygga klyftan mellan utveckling och drift genom att kombinera det bästa av automation, molnteknik och agila arbetssätt. Vi tror på kraften i samarbete och ständig utveckling – både teknisk och personlig – och erbjuder en arbetsplats där du får växa tillsammans med andra passionerade och kompetenta konsulter.
 



  





  





**OM TJÄNSTEN** 




 Som DevOps-konsult hos SDNit kommer du att spela en nyckelroll i att hjälpa våra kunder att införa och vidareutveckla moderna DevOps-principer och lösningar. Rollen är både strategisk och operativ, där du får arbeta med allt från arkitektur och design till implementation, felsökning och förbättringsarbete. Du får stora möjligheter att påverka teknikval och arbetssätt – i nära samarbete med kundens team.
 



  





  





**Ditt ansvarsområde:** 



* Design och implementation av
 **CI/CD-pipelines** 
 med verktyg som
 **GitLab CI/CD,** 
**GitHub Actions** 
 eller
 **Jenkins** 
 .
* Infrastrukturautomation med verktyg som
 **Ansible** 
 ,
 **Terraform** 
 eller
 **Pulumi** 
 .
* Molnarkitektur och drift i miljöer som
 **AWS** 
 ,
 **Azure** 
 eller
 **Google Cloud** 
 .
* Containerisering och orkestrering med
 **Docker** 
 och
 **Kubernetes** 
 .
* Övervakning, logghantering och incidenthantering med moderna observability-verktyg.
* Stötta och guida utvecklingsteam i DevOps-arbete, automation och bästa praxis.



  





  





**KOMPETENSER** 




 Vi söker dig som har:
 


* 3+ års erfarenhet i en DevOps-roll, med dokumenterad erfarenhet av automation, drift och utveckling.
* Erfarenhet av CI/CD-verktyg som
 **GitLab CI/CD,** 
**Jenkins** 
 ,
 **GitHub Actions** 
 eller liknande.
* Vana att arbeta i molnmiljöer (
 **AWS** 
 ,
 **Azure** 
 ,
 **GCP** 
 ).
* Kunskap om konfigurationshantering och Infrastructure as Code (t.ex.
 **Ansible,** 
**Terraform** 
 ,
 **Puppet** 
 ).
* Programmering- eller scriptingkunskaper i t.ex.
 **Python** 
 ,
 **Bash** 
 eller
 **Go** 
 .
* Erfarenhet av containerteknologi
 **(Docker)** 
 och gärna även
 **Kubernetes** 
 .



  





  





**MERITERANDE** 




 Vi ser det som ett plus om du även har:
 


* Intresse för eller erfarenhet av
 **Site Reliability Engineering (SRE)** 
 .
* Kunskap inom observability: t.ex.
 **Prometheus** 
 ,
 **Grafana** 
 ,
 **ELK** 
 ,
 **Datadog** 
 eller liknande.
* Erfarenhet av policy-as-code, säkerhetsautomation eller GitOps-verktyg som
 **ArgoCD** 
 eller
 **Flux** 
 .
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta i team med agil metodik (
 **Scrum** 
 ,
 **Kanban** 
 ).



  





  





**VILKA VI ÄR** 




 På SDNit hittar du ett team som kombinerar djup teknisk expertis med en stark passion för automation, säkerhet och smarta arbetssätt. Vi är konsulter inom DevOps, NetOps, SecOps och IT management – med ett gemensamt fokus på att skapa hållbara, effektiva och moderna lösningar för våra kunder.
 



  





 Vi tror på kraften i innovation, samarbete och ständig utveckling – både för våra kunder och internt. Hos oss får du en arbetsmiljö där du kan växa, påverka och trivas, omgiven av kunniga och engagerade kollegor.
 



  





 Vi satsar på kompetensutveckling, flexibilitet och gemenskap genom utbildningar, resor och aktiviteter som afterworks och coworking Fridays. Våra medarbetare är vår viktigaste tillgång, och vi strävar efter att bygga en inkluderande, trygg och inspirerande arbetsplats.
 



  





  





**ÄR DU VÅR NÄSTA KOLLEGA?** 




 Skicka in din ansökan med CV till
 **hello@sdnit.se** 
 . Har du frågor om tjänsten? Kontakta vår kollega Malin Ljungberg, på
 **0709 12 66 57** 
 eller
 **malin.ljungberg@sdnit.se** 
 .
 



  





 Vi ser fram emot din ansökan!

title: DevOps Engineer
description:
*Kreditz is transforming how businesses assess credit and risk using real-time data and NextGen Credit Scoring solutions.*
*As one of Europe’s fastest-growing FinTech scaleups - we’ve earned a place on the* 
***Sifted 100: Nordics & Benelux***
*list in both 2024 and 2025 and most recently, we were proud to receive a* 
***double win at the Credit Management & Compliance Awards 2025***
*, being named both "* 
***Fintech Rocket of the Year***
*" and "* 
***Breakthrough of the Year***
*".*
*With strong growth across the Nordics and Europe, our clients range from leading banks and iGaming giants to fast-moving digital innovators.*
**About The Position**
 Kreditz is looking for a
 **DevOps Engineer** 
 to join our Tech team. In this role, you will build and evolve our cloud infrastructure, CI/CD pipelines, and platform tooling, ensuring our systems are scalable, reliable, and secure as we grow.
   

  

 This is a hands-on builder role for someone who enjoys automation, ownership, and turning complexity into clean, scalable infrastructure.
   

  

**What Can Kreditz Offer**
* A once-in-a-lifetime growth journey, from startup to Global scaleup
* A journey where everyone in the team plays a crucial role for our company’s success
* Fun-loving, driven, and passionate colleagues who support each other’s success
* A culture that celebrates progress, humility, and teamwork
* We win together
* 24/7 access to gym, sauna and sports facilities at our office, plus additional wellness allowance
* Competitive base salary


**RESPONSIBILITES**
**Some Of The Main Responsibilities You Will Cover**
* Design, build, and maintain cloud infrastructure using Infrastructure as Code (Terraform).
* Develop and optimize CI/CD pipelines for automated testing and deployment.
* Build and deploy services on AWS using ECS, Fargate, and Service Connect.
* Implement and maintain monitoring, alerting, and observability solutions.
* Collaborate with developers to improve deployment workflows and platform reliability.
* Work with serverless technologies (Lambda) for event processing and automation.
* Perform code reviews and contribute hands-on to infrastructure projects.
* Leverage AI agents and tools to enhance development workflows and productivity.
* Document infrastructure architecture, processes, and runbooks.


 Success means engineers ship confidently, systems scale without drama, and incidents are rare, visible, and quickly resolved.
   

  

**WE ARE LOOKING FOR**
**We Believe That You Have**
* A Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, IT, or related field (or equivalent experience).
* 5+ years of experience in DevOps, platform engineering, or backend development.
* Strong skills in Infrastructure as Code (Terraform).
* Experience with AWS services, particularly ECS, Fargate, and Service Connect.
* Experience with CI/CD tools and pipeline automation.
* Familiarity with containerization (Docker/Podman).
* Familiarity with message queuing (SQS, SNS).
* Experience with databases like PostgreSQL, MySQL, Redis, DynamoDB.
* Strong skills in monitoring and observability tools (CloudWatch, OpenTelemetry, X-Ray).
* Proficiency with Git and version control workflows.
* Scripting skills in Python, Bash, or Go.
* Excellent English communication skills (Swedish is a plus).
* Enthusiasm for using AI agents and tools in daily development work.
* Experience in FinTech is a plus.


**WHY JOIN NOW?**
 At Kreditz, you'll have the opportunity to work in a cutting-edge, fast-growing FinTech company that's redefining the credit scoring industry. With the backing of major investors and a clear vision for the future, your work will make a real impact on financial inclusion worldwide. Join us and be a part of something truly transformative!
   

  

**APPOINTMENT OF ROLE**
 Q1/Q2 2026
   

  

**SCOPE**
 Full-time, permanent employment (tillsvidareanställning)
   

  

**SALARY**
 Competitive salary
   

  

**REPORTING**
 You will be reporting to the company’s VP Engineering
   

  

**WORKPLACE**
 Danderyd, Stockholm
   

  

**RECRUITMENT PROCESS**
 Ongoing selection, we review candidates continuously.
   

  

*Last day for applications 31st March 2026*
**CRIMINAL RECORDS EXTRACT**
 As part of our recruitment process we will ask you to present a clean criminal records extract
   

  

**CONTACT**
 Lorenzo Puccio, VP Strategic Operations, Lorenzo@kreditz.com
   

  

 For more information about the role feel free to reach out to our Co-founder/CTO, arlen@kreditz.com
   

  

 Intelligent credit- & risk decisions made easy with open banking & AI-technology

title: Cloud Architect Azure
description:
**Jobbeskrivning**
**Vill du arbeta på en av Sveriges bästa arbetsplatser?**
 Sopra Steria, Nordens ledande företag inom digital transformation, söker en erfaren och kompetent Cloud Architect inom Azure med dokumenterad erfarenhet för att stärka vårt framstående team. Vi har blivit erkända som Karriärföretag och en av Sveriges bästa arbetsplatser 2025 av Great Place to Work. I denna roll kommer du att spela en avgörande roll i leveransen av innovativa molnbaserade projekt till våra kunder samt bidra till vidareutvecklingen av vårt framstående molnerbjudande
   

  

**Som Arkitektkonsult Inom Azure Kommer Du Att**
* Delta aktivt i planering, design och implementation av Azure-lösningar för våra kunder.
* Operativt arbeta med lösningar som omfattar hela bredden av Azure-plattformen, inklusive IaaS och PaaS, med fokus på Entra ID för identitets- och åtkomststyrning.
* Coacha och vägleda kunder om optimal användning av moln- och hybridteknologi för att implementera nya lösningar eller migrera befintliga tjänster till Azure.
* Fungera som ämnesexpert som stödjer flera team eller som teknisk teamledare med övergripande ansvar för leveransen.


**För att lyckas med detta tror vi att du:**
* Minst 5 års dokumenterad erfarenhet som Azure-arkitekt med stark tekniskt fokus och problemlösningsförmåga.
* Utmärkta kommunikationsfärdigheter på svenska och engelska, både i tal och skrift.
* Förmåga att automatisera och optimera arbetsflöden.
* Erfarenhet av att översätta kundens behov till konkreta designförslag och implementeringar.
* Erfarenhet från konsultbranschen med förmåga att arbeta i både stora och små team.


**Kvalifikationer Och Färdigheter**
* Erfarenhet av design och implementering av lösningar i det publika molnet, med fokus på kostnadsoptimering, säkerhet, skalbarhet, prestanda och tillgänglighet.
* Kompetens inom programmerings- och/eller skriptspråk (Powershell, Bash, Python etc.).
* Erfarenhet av CI/CD-verktyg som Azure DevOps eller GitHub.
* Erfarenhet av Infrastructure as Code (ARM, Bicep, Terraform etc.).
* Förståelse och erfarenhet av ramverk som Microsoft Cloud Adoption Framework, Security Adoption Framework samt Well-Architected Framework
* Kunskap inom molnsäkerhet och Zero Trust arkitektur.
* Kunskap och erfarenhet av containerlösningar som Docker och Kubernetes är meriterande.


**Om Sopra Steria**
 Sopra Steria är en global aktör inom digital transformation med över 50 000 medarbetare i över 30 länder, varav 600 i Sverige. Vi har blivit rankade som en av Sveriges bästa arbetsplatser 2025 av Great Place to Work och är ett av topp fem bolag inom Digital Transformation enligt Gartner. Vi erbjuder en inkluderande och skicklig arbetsmiljö där du har möjlighet att vässa dina kunskaper och arbeta med branschens mest spännande projekt. Vi står nu inför en spännande tillväxtresa som genomsyrar hela verksamheten där det finns stora möjligheter att växa tillsammans med bolaget och skapa verklig förändring genom digital utveckling.
   

  

 Har du fler frågor? Om du har några fler frågor angående tjänsten får du gärna höra av dig till ansvarig rekryterare Teodor Nellvik (teodor.nellvik@soprasteria.com).
   

  

 På Sopra Steria ställer vi höga krav på både kompetens och säkerhetsmedvetenhet hos våra medarbetare. Innan en eventuell anställning kommer du därför att genomgå en bakgrundskontroll, och vid intervju behöver du kunna uppvisa giltig legitimation.
   

  

 Sopra Steria tar inte emot CV:n från företag som vi inte har ramavtal tillsammans med. Vi tar inte ansvar för eventuella avgifter på CV:n som skickas oönskat till oss. To all recruitment agencies without a base agreement: Sopra Steria does not accept resumes from agencies with whom we do not have an agreement. Please do not forward resumes to our jobs alias, Sopra Steria employees or any other company location. Sopra Steria is not responsible for any fees related to unsolicited resumes.
   

  

**Ytterligare information**
 Sopra Steria är ett ledande internationellt konsultbolag inom digital transformation. Vi bygger samhället genom designdriven innovation, teknisk utveckling med kunskap om marknadens ledande plattformar och driftlösningar (managed services). Med modern teknologi och en gedigen affärsförståelse är vi en helhetspartner för våra kunder och deras digitala transformationsresa. Enligt Great Place To Work är vi en av Sveriges bästa arbetsplatser, vi har tilldelats utmärkelsen Karriärföretag flera år i rad och Gartner har listat oss som ett topp 5 bolag inom digital transformation.

title: Cloud Engineer
description:
**Cloud Engineer | Production Engineering | Sweden | Remote**
 RLDatix (RLD) is on a mission to help raise the standard of care…everywhere. Trusted by over 10,000 healthcare organisations around the world, our solutions help improve health and care. Our applications ensure that patients receive the best and safest care while supporting the providers who deliver it.
   

  

 Joining TeamRLD means being part of a global effort of over 2,000 team members in making a difference in healthcare…every day.
   

  

 We’re searching for a
 **Sweden-based Engineer III** 
 to join our
 **Production Engineering** 
 team, so that we can
 **design and maintain robust cloud-based infrastructure to support reliable software deployment and operations** 
 . The
 **Engineer III** 
 will
 **resolve moderately complex technical issues, automate deployment pipelines, and drive system performance improvements** 
 to
 **ensure operational excellence and system resilience across our global platform** 
 .
   

  

**How You’ll Spend Your Time**
* Design scalable infrastructure using cloud platforms and Infrastructure-as-Code (Terraform) to ensure high reliability.
* Automate deployment and operational processes using Configuration-as-Code (YAML, JSON, XML) for consistency and efficiency.
* Implement monitoring and observability solutions to proactively detect and resolve system issues.
* Develop and maintain CI/CD pipelines to enable reliable software delivery.
* Collaborate with development teams to embed reliability and scalability into software design.


**What Kind of Things We’re Most Interested in You Having**
* 3+ years of experience working with AWS or Azure in cloud infrastructure engineering or DevOps roles.
* Proven success in building and maintaining automation pipelines.
* In-depth knowledge of Infrastructure-as-Code (Terraform) and Configuration-as-Code practices.
* Hands-on experience with Git, scripting languages (PowerShell, Bash, Python), and major hyperscalers.
* Operational experience in cloud networking (VPC, subnets, load balancers, DNS) and HTTPS/TLS.
* Fluency in English and Swedish to effectively communicate with customers and internal teams.
* Sincere interest in healthcare technology and operational excellence.
* A knack for working collaboratively in a fast-paced, production environment.


 By enabling flexibility in how we work and prioritizing employee wellness, we empower our team to do and be their best.
   

  

 RLDatix is an equal opportunity employer, and our employment decisions are made without regard to race, color, religion, age, gender, sexual identity, national origin, disability, handicap, marital status or any other status or condition protected by law.
   

  

 As part of RLDatix’s commitment to the inclusion of all qualified individuals, we ensure that persons with disabilities are provided reasonable accommodation in the job application and interview process. If reasonable accommodation is needed to participate in either step, please don’t hesitate to send a note to accessibility@rldatix.com.

title: AWS DevOps Engineer
description:
**Description**
 They say, ‘it’s not rocket science.’ We disagree.
   

  

 Welcome to SSC Space (formerly Swedish Space Corporation), the perfect workplace for those passionate about technology in general and space in particular.
   

  

 With space organizations, research institutes, institutional and commercial actors as customers, we offer specialist expertise in satellite communications, space consulting services, rocket and balloon systems, flight test services, satellite propulsion systems, and much more.
   

  

 SSC also has one of the world’s largest global networks of ground stations for satellite communications. We own and operate the Esrange Space Center in Kiruna, northern Sweden, with the aim of launching satellites in the near future.
   

  

 At SSC Space, our systems help launch rockets and control satellites. To do that, we need robust automation, reliable deployments, and a cloud platform that just works. That's why we are looking for an AWS DevOps Engineer who thrives on clean pipelines, codified infrastructure, and high uptime.
   

  

**Requirements**
 As AWS DevOps Engineer, you’ll be a builder of automation, an advocate for reliability, and a champion for operational excellence and with a focus on Observability. You’ll work hands-on with AWS and modern DevOps tools to streamline how we deploy and manage our systems.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
* Develop and maintain Infrastructure as Code using Terraform or CloudFormation
* Design and operate monitoring stacks (e.g. Grafana, CloudWatch)
* Define logging, metrics, and tracing standards
* Build CI/CD pipelines for cloud-based systems and applications
* Automate deployment and environment provisioning workflows
* Manage containerized workloads with EKS, ECS, or Fargate
* Monitor systems and respond to operational incidents
* Improve reliability through observability, testing, and automation
* Collaborate with developers and architects on solution design and deployment
* Document infrastructure and processes for internal use and audits
* Quality assurance
* Software supply chain – ECR, JFROG
* Building policy engine and guardrails focus on security
* Application Performance Monitoring “observability”.


**Responsibilities**
 We're looking for someone who loves automation and takes pride in reliable systems. You’re curious about how things work and committed to continuous improvement.
   

  

**You Have**
* 3+ years of hands-on AWS experience in production environments
* Solid skills in infrastructure-as-code tools (Terraform, CloudFormation)
* Experience building CI/CD pipelines (e.g. GitHub Actions, AWS CodePipeline, Jenkins)
* Familiarity with container orchestration and Linux system administration
* Knowledge of monitoring and logging solutions in AWS and Grafana.


**Valuable additional experience:**
* Experience with Ansible or similar config management tools
* Scripting skills (Python, Bash)
* Exposure to DevOps practices.


**How you work** 
 :
   

  

* Automation-first mindset
* Collaborative and service-minded
* Comfortable working across IT and development teams
* Fluent in Swedish and English.


**Benefits**
 WE OFFER YOU
   

  

* A unique opportunity to contribute to a wide range of projects and play an active role in both the Swedish and international space industry.
* An excellent opportunity for personal and career development.
* An exciting, international workplace characterized by an open atmosphere and proud employees all over the world.


**Additional Benefits**
* In addition to vacation and traditional public holidays, we offer extra paid leave throughout the year, such as time off between Christmas and New Year, Ascension Day, amounting to 6-11 extra days depending on the calendar.
* Wellness allowance of SEK 5,000 per year.
* Health benefits such as voluntary health insurance and regular health checks for eligible employees.
* Access to a benefit bike through a tax-efficient leasing program.
* Support for employee-driven activities that promote connection, health, and culture across teams.
* Collective Agreement, including good pensions plans, parental pay and insurance.


 LOCATION
   

  

 This is a full-time, permanent position with hybrid work setup in our office in Solna Strand.
   

  

 FURTHER INFORMATION
   

  

 For questions regarding employment terms or union-related matters, you are welcome to contact our union representatives:
   

  

 Sveriges Ingenjörer: SverigesIngenjorer-AF@sscspace.com
   

  

 Unionen: unionen@sscspace.com
   

  

  

  

 NEXT STEP
   

  

 If this opportunity sparks your interest, we encourage you to apply as soon as possible! We review applications continuously and will conduct interviews throughout the process.
   

  

 You can submit your application up until 2026-03-29, which is the latest possible date for consideration.
   

  

 Please note, however, that the position may be filled before this date, and the advertisement may therefore close earlier. This allows us to manage the process efficiently and give each application the attention it deserves.
   

  

 When applying, please include your CV. While you are welcome to include a brief personal note or letter, our evaluation will primarily focus on your skills and qualifications as outlined in your CV, ensuring a fair and unbiased recruitment process.
   

  

 This position requires approved pre-employment screening. These controls are based on the role that you will fulfill within the company. Additional requirements regarding citizenship may apply.
   

  

 WE HELP EARTH BENEFIT FROM SPACE
   

  

 SSC Space is a leading global provider of advanced space services, with more than 50 years of experience. We help space organizations, research institutes, commercial and institutional actors from all over the world to get access to space.
   

  

 With local presence on all continents and about 700 committed employees, we offer specialist expertise in satellite communications and satellite control services, spacecraft operations, rocket and balloon systems, launch services and flight test services, as well as engineering, operations and consultancy services for space missions.
   

  

 We help Earth benefit from Space. Learn more at sscspace.com

title: DevOps Engineer within eHealth
description:
*Cambio is one of the Nordics' leading suppliers in eHealth with a comprehensive offering for the entire health and care chain. Our eHealth solutions support health care professionals in their daily work and offer patients safer and more easily accessible care. We are proud to be an important part of Swedish healthcare. We are growing continuously and now have about 1000 employees in several countries.*
**The position**
 As a DevOps Engineer, you will be part of a highly skilled, ambitious tech team building an AI‑driven system that operates at the core of clinical workflows. Cambio Ambient Scribe is an ambient AI assistant that listens to and documents patient–clinician conversations in real time. By reducing administrative burden and saving up to two hours per day for healthcare professionals, the product helps clinicians focus on what truly matters: the patient.
   

  

*Read more* 
 here.
   

  

 In this role, you will take
 **end‑to‑end ownership of our cloud and platform infrastructure** 
 , ensuring that the system is
 **secure, reliable, and ready to scale** 
 as the product grows from thousands to tens of thousands of users. You will work closely with backend, AI, frontend, and product teams to enable fast, safe, and efficient delivery of an AI‑powered healthcare platform.
   

  

 This is a hands‑on role for someone who enjoys combining
 **infrastructure, automation, and problem‑solving** 
 , and who wants to play a central role in shaping a modern DevOps platform in a regulated and mission‑critical environment.
   

  

**Some of the things you’ll do**
* Own, operate, and evolve our cloud infrastructure, primarily in Azure, with a roadmap toward Kubernetes / OpenShift.
* Build and maintain Kubernetes platforms, including Helm, ingress, RBAC, scheduling, and networking.
* Design and operate secure, automated CI/CD pipelines (Azure DevOps / GitHub Actions).
* Implement observability and monitoring using tools such as Prometheus, Grafana, Loki, or ELK.
* Apply DevSecOps principles across the stack, including identity, secrets management, network policies, and compliance.
* Deploy, monitor, and scale PostgreSQL / Supabase environments, including backup, performance, and reliability.
* Support and optimize GPU‑based AI inference workloads, collaborating closely with backend and AI engineers.
* Act as a technical partner to the development teams, improving deployment, stability, and operational efficiency.


**We offer**
 At Cambio, you don’t just work with infrastructure – you enable technology that
 **directly improves healthcare** 
 .
   

  

**You’ll Get The Opportunity To**
* Work on a cutting‑edge AI product deeply integrated into COSMIC, Sweden’s most widely used electronic health record system.
* Be part of a small, highly competent team with strong ownership, short decision paths, and a startup mindset within a stable company.
* Influence the cloud and platform architecture of a product that is scaling rapidly and handling sensitive healthcare data.
* Grow with the role – both technically and in responsibility – while solving problems that truly matter to society.


**About You**
 We believe you are a
 **Senior DevOps / Cloud Engineer** 
 who is comfortable taking responsibility for complex, production‑critical systems. You combine a strong technical foundation with curiosity, pragmatism, and a drive to continuously improve how systems are built, deployed, and operated.
   

  

 Rather than matching every single technology listed, what matters most is that you are
 **confident designing and running secure, scalable cloud platforms** 
 and enjoy working closely with developers to enable efficient, reliable software delivery.
   

  

**We see that you tick some of the following boxes:**
* Several years of experience (typically 5+) working with DevOps, cloud engineering, or platform engineering in production environments.
* Strong experience with cloud infrastructure, ideally Azure (but experience from AWS or GCP is also valuable).
* Hands‑on experience with containers and Kubernetes, or a clear ambition to move deeper into Kubernetes/OpenShift.
* Experience designing and maintaining CI/CD pipelines and infrastructure automation.
* Solid understanding of security principles across cloud, network, and application layers.
* Experience with monitoring, observability, and operating systems in production.
* Ability to take ownership, communicate technical decisions, and work closely with development teams.
* Comfort using modern AI tools as part of your engineering workflow to improve efficiency and quality.
* Experience with GPU workloads and real‑time AI inference in production.
* Experience with microservices architectures and distributed systems.
* Experience working in regulated environments, such as healthcare or financial services.
* Familiarity with FastAPI / Python applications and how application design impacts infrastructure and operations.


**Place of employment** 
 : Umeå or Stockholm
   

  

**Scope** 
 : Full-time, hybrid work model (three days per week in-office)
   

  

**Form of employment:** 
 Permanent employment, 6 months trial period
   

  

**Additional Information:** 
 The role involves access to sensitive information, therefore a background check will be conducted on the final candidate.
   

  

 We review applications and conduct interviews on a rolling basis, so we encourage you to apply as soon as possible via the link.
   

  

**We look forward to receiving your application!**
**CAMBIO- FOR A HEALTHIER TOMORROW**
 Welcome to a company where healthcare is improved every day. Here you will work with leading technology in a collaborative, trusting and empowering environment where your contribution will be appreciated and celebrated. In our caring culture you will have the opportunity to pursue different paths of professional growth. Seize the opportunity to do the most important work of your life
 **.** 
 Read more about us
 **here!**
**A healthier tomorrow also means taking care of those who make it possible -** 
 explore our employee benefits
   

  

 Learn more about our recruitment process here
   

  

 Are you interested in Cambio but you don’t feel that this position is the perfect match? Check out our other open positions at our career site.
   

  

 Cambio Healthcare Systems is Sweden’s leading suppliers of healthcare information systems and a growing player in the European market with just over 100,000 users across general and university hospitals, specialist units and outpatient units. Through the use of our integrated solutions, our customers provide services to 4 million patients.

title: SOTI
description:
JD
 



  





 Primary Focus: Migration from SOTI MobiControl to SOTI MobiCloud, rugged Android ecosystems, and Cloud Link Agent integrations
 



  





 ROLE SUMMARY
 



 We are seeking an experienced SOTI Domain Subject Matter Expert (SME) at L3 capability level to lead and support enterprise mobility environments across global operations. The primary responsibility is to architect, plan, and execute the migration of a large‑scale device fleet from SOTI MobiControl (on‑prem) to SOTI MobiCloud (SaaS) while providing advanced troubleshooting, optimization, and lifecycle management.
 



  





 The ideal candidate brings deep expertise in Android Enterprise, rugged mobility platforms (Honeywell & Zebra), enterprise integrations via Cloud Link Agent, and large‑scale industrial environments.
 



  





 KEY RESPONSIBILITIES
 



 Migration & Architecture
 



 - Lead the end‑to‑end migration from SOTI MobiControl on‑prem to SOTI MobiCloud.
 



 - Design Android Enterprise fully managed, work profile, and dedicated device deployments.
 



 - Align SOTI configuration, profiles, compliance rules, and architecture with cloud best practices.
 



 - Collaborate with security, networking, and infrastructure teams.
 



  





 L3 Support & Operations
 



 - Serve as top‑tier escalation for MobiControl/MobiCloud issues.
 



 - Troubleshoot agent behavior, deployment failures, device check‑in issues, and OEM‑specific challenges.
 



 - Optimize performance and automation using scripts and SOTI APIs.
 



  





 Automation & Scripting
 



 - Develop advanced SOTI scripts, automation flows, and REST‑API integrations.
 



 - Implement workflow efficiencies across device lifecycle.
 



  





 RUGGED DEVICE & PLATFORM EXPERTISE
 



 Honeywell Devices
 



 - Honeywell Mobility Edge platforms (CT, Thor, Dolphin).
 



 - Honeywell Enterprise Launcher, DCP, SDK integrations.
 



 - Deep knowledge of scanning, peripherals, key remapping, and device APIs.
 



  





 Zebra Devices
 



 - Expertise with TC, MC, WT, ET series.
 



 - Zebra StageNow, MX Extensions, OEMConfig, DataWedge.
 



 - Troubleshooting printing, scanning, networking, and EMM integrations.
 



  





 Android Enterprise Specialization
 



 - Android Enterprise provisioning, zero‑touch, managed Google Play.
 



 - OEMConfig policies, compliance frameworks, and platform hardening.
 



 - Knowledge of AOSP variants and industrial integrations.
 



  





 CLOUD LINK AGENT & ENTERPRISE INTEGRATION EXPERTISE
 



 Cloud Link Agent (CLA)
 



 - Architect, deploy, and manage Cloud Link Agent for secure hybrid connectivity.
 



 - Configure HA setups, certificates, routing, and secure tunnels.
 



 - Troubleshoot CLA service dependencies and connector failures.
 



  





 Identity & Directory Integrations
 



 Active Directory (AD)
 



 - LDAP/LDAPS integrations, authentication, user/device mapping.
 



  





 Entra ID (Azure AD)
 



 - OAuth/OIDC integrations.
 



 - Conditional Access for Android Enterprise.
 



 - Certificates, token management, API permissions.
 



  





 Google Services & Android Integrations
 



 - Managed Google Play, zero‑touch, private app publishing.
 



 - Integrations with Google EMM services, Play Integrity, and device attestation.
 



  





 Enterprise App Integrations
 



 - Integrating internal and third‑party systems using REST APIs.
 



 - Automating LOB app deployments, provisioning, and lifecycle flows.
 



  





 GENERAL SKILLS & EXPERIENCE
 



 - 5–10+ years in Enterprise Mobility Management.
 



 - 4+ years with SOTI MobiControl/MobiCloud.
 



 - Experience with rugged mobility in logistics, retail, manufacturing.
 



 - Strong knowledge of industrial Wi‑Fi tuning (802.11 k/r/v).
 



 - Excellent communication and stakeholder management.
 



  





 PREFERRED CERTIFICATIONS
 



 - SOTI MobiControl Certification.
 



 - Honeywell or Zebra certifications.
 



 - Android Enterprise Professional/Expert.
 



 - ITIL Foundation

title: Senior tekniker inom Kubernetes och containerlösningar
description:
Vi på Iver brinner för innovationer och god laganda, vi är särskilt intresserad av dig som gillar att tänka nytt och dela med dig av dina tankar. Vi söker nu dig som är en Kubernetes-guru till vår innovativ containerplattform och som vill bidra till bättre IT-lösningar för våra kunder. Är du vår nya kollega?
   

  

**Vårt team:**
 Cleura Stockholm grundades 2000 som Nogui Teknik AB och är ett dotterbolag till Iver gruppen. Vi har sedan tidigt 00-tal utvecklats kontinuerligt med målsättningen att ligga i IT-teknikens framkant inom vårdsektorn. Sedan 2021 är vi en del av Iver AB och bolaget bytte namn från Nogui Teknik AB till Cleura Stockholm AB.
   

  

 Vi är idag 12 specialister i Stockholm som arbetar med de senaste teknologierna inom privata molntjänster och applikationsdrift. Våra kunder finns runt om i landet och består till stor del av privata och offentliga aktörer inom vårdsektorn och även i andra sektorer.
   

  

**Vilka är vi på Cleura Stockholm AB?**
 Vi är ett tight och drivet gäng som alltid arbetar med de senaste versionerna av t.ex. kubernetes, openshift, mariadb, redis, mongodb, haproxy, apache. Vi har ett högt tempo och tar snabbt till oss nya teknologier.
   

  

 Vår IT-miljö är till stor del automatiserad och vi har mycket hög leveranskapacitet och korta ledtider. Vi erbjuder moderna PaaS-tjänster med en dedikerad Openshift-plattform som tillhandahåller det senaste inom containerteknologi och Kubernetes samt traditionella IaaS-tjänster och applikationsdrift. Vi jobbar ständigt med förbättringar av säkerheten och våra tjänster har högsta säkerhetsbetyg. Vi utfärdar och hanterar kontinuerligt över 400 SSL-certifikat.
   

  

**Din roll?**
 I din roll som senior tekniker inom kubernetes etablerar och vidareutvecklar du våra kubernetesbaserade driftplattformar on-prem och i privata molntjänster. Som en i vårt team av experter stödjer du olika kundprojekt i olika ärenden relaterat till driftplattformen. Ditt jobb omfattar bland annat systemadministration av infrastruktur, Linux och Kubernetes.
   

  

 Ansvarsområden:
   

  

* Implementera och underhålla Kubernetes-kluster och relaterad infrastruktur
* Optimering av prestanda och säkerhet för vår infrastruktur och applikationer
* Samarbeta med andra team och avdelningar för att säkerställa högsta möjliga tillgänglighet och skalbarhet för våra tjänster
* Delta i och driva förbättringar i vår infrastruktur och arbeta med att implementera de senaste teknikerna inom DevOps-området


**Vi söker dig som:**
 Är trygg i din egen kunskap och gärna har erfarenhet av att arbeta med stora företag/organisationer som kunder. Du är en utpräglad teamplayer som är ansvarsfull och gärna jobbar tight ihop med övriga i teamet och våra kunder. Du har en stark vilja att utvecklas ännu mer och har lätt för att lära nytt.
   

  

 Du har sannolikt en bakgrund och erfarenhet från infrastruktur och/eller som arkitekt alternativt bakgrund som utvecklare och/eller tekniker med bra koll på systemadmin och med stort intresse för vårt tekniska område.
   

  

 Du har sannolikt ett “hemmalabb” där du gillar att experimentera med de senaste teknologierna inom Kubernetes.
   

  

 Kvalifikationer:
   

  

* Erfarenhet av att arbeta med Linux.
* Djup kunskap om Kubernetes, inklusive design, implementering och underhåll av Kubernetes-kluster
* Kunskap om PAM-lösningar är meriterande
* Förmåga att arbeta självständigt och som en del av ett team
* God kommunikationsförmåga och förmåga att samarbeta med andra team och avdelningar


 För att kunna göra ett bra jobb hos oss behöver du i övrigt:
   

  

* Behärska svenska och engelska i tal och skrift


**Övrig information:**
* Tjänsten är tillsvidare och placerad vid Skanstull
* Möjlighet till distansarbete upp till ca 50%
* Svenskt medborgarskap krävs
* Beredskap kan komma att ingå.


 Vi ställer höga krav på våra medarbetares säkerhets- och sekretessmedvetenhet. Innan ett beslut om anställning fattas kommer en säkerhetsprövning enligt säkerhetsskyddslagen (2018:585) att genomföras i de fall befattningen innebär hantering av säkerhetsskyddsklassificerade uppgifter eller deltagande i säkerhetskänslig verksamhet. Om anställningen avser befattning i säkerhetsklass kommer säkerhetsprövningen även att innefatta en registerkontroll och, i vissa fall, en särskild.
   

  

**Förmåner hos oss:**
 🏠 Hybridarbete
   

  

 💪 Friskvårdsbidrag
   

  

 👓 Terminalglasögon
   

  

 ⏳ Tidsbank – 24 h extra ledighet/år
   

  

 🩺 Privat sjukvårdsförsäkring
   

  

 💼 Tjänstepension (ITP) & flexpension
   

  

**Sök till oss!**
 Önskad start är snarast eller enligt överenskommelse.
   

  

 Välkommen att kontakta rekryterande chef Kennet Jonsson (kennet.jonsson@iver.se) eller rekryterare Jennie Vilhelmsson (jennie.vilhelmsson@iver.se) vid frågor eller funderingar kring tjänsten.
   

  

 Vi ser fram emot din ansökan!
   

  

**We empower our Nordic society** 
 . Iver är en ledande nordisk helhetsleverantör av molnbaserade IT-tjänster med spetskompetens inom drift, cybersäkerhet, cloud och innovation.
   

  

**Våra tjänster är kritiska inte bara för våra kunder – utan för digitaliseringen av samhället i stort.** 
 Vi säkerställer att sjukvården har tillgång till rätt patientdata, att samhällskritiska system aldrig ligger nere och att flygplanen landar säkert. Som en lyhörd och affärsnära helhetspartner möjliggör vi våra kunders innovation – idag och imorgon.

title: Platform Success Manager
description:
**FICO (NYSE: FICO)** 
 is a leading global analytics software company, helping businesses in 100+ countries make better decisions. Join our world-class team today and fulfill your career potential!
   

  

**The Opportunity**
*“As a Platform Success Manager, you will serve as a strategic advisor and trusted partner to enterprise customers leveraging the FICO Platform. Balancing business acumen with technical understanding, you will ensure customers achieve measurable value through effective platform adoption, operational alignment, and ongoing engagement. Your mission is to drive customer success by aligning platform capabilities with strategic goals, ensuring both business impact and operational excellence.”* 
 - Platform Success, Senior Director
   

  

**What You'll Contribute**
* Build and maintain strong, trust-based relationships with business stakeholders, product owners, and executive sponsors.
* Conduct strategic planning and regular business reviews to align platform usage with customers' evolving goals.
* Drive value realization by linking platform capabilities to business outcomes across industries like banking, insurance, and telecom.
* Lead enablement and ongoing engagement efforts to maximize customer adoption and satisfaction.
* Promote usage of platform features through best practices, tailored training, and data-driven recommendations.
* Facilitate change management and empower customers to become self-sufficient users of the platform.
* Partner with technical teams (DevOps, Engineering, IT) to ensure secure, scalable, and compliant platform deployments.
* Monitor key performance indicators (KPIs), usage patterns, and service health to proactively identify risks or optimization opportunities.
* Support incident response and ensure timely communication, transparency, and continuous improvement.
* Act as the voice of the customer across internal teams, influencing product direction and support priorities based on field insights.
* Work closely with Sales and Professional Services to identify expansion opportunities and align on customer growth strategies.
* Develop and maintain success plans that integrate functional outcomes, platform performance metrics, and strategic objectives.


**What We're Seeking**
* 5+ years of experience in customer success, platform consulting, or strategic account management, preferably with enterprise SaaS/PaaS platforms.
* Demonstrated ability to engage both business and technical stakeholders, translating complex concepts into clear value propositions.
* Strong business acumen and experience driving measurable outcomes in highly regulated or data-driven industries.
* Familiarity with cloud-native platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP), APIs, and platform health metrics—enough to collaborate effectively with technical teams.
* Excellent communication, facilitation, and stakeholder management skills.
* Bachelor’s degree in Business, Information Systems, Computer Science, or a related field.


**Our Offer to You**
* An inclusive culture strongly reflecting our core values: Act Like an Owner, Delight Our Customers and Earn the Respect of Others.
* The opportunity to make an impact and develop professionally by leveraging your unique strengths and participating in valuable learning experiences.
* Highly competitive compensation, benefits and rewards programs that encourage you to bring your best every day and be recognized for doing so.
* An engaging, people-first work environment offering work/life balance, employee resource groups, and social events to promote interaction and camaraderie.


**Why Make a Move to FICO?**
 At FICO, you can develop your career with a leading organization in one of the fastest-growing fields in technology today – Big Data analytics. You’ll play a part in our commitment to help businesses use data to improve every choice they make, using advances in artificial intelligence, machine learning, optimization, and much more.
   

  

 FICO makes a real difference in the way businesses operate worldwide:
   

  

* Credit Scoring — FICO® Scores are used by 90 of the top 100 US lenders.
* Fraud Detection and Security — 4 billion payment cards globally are protected by FICO fraud systems.
* Lending — 3/4 of US mortgages are approved using the FICO Score.


 Global trends toward digital transformation have created tremendous demand for FICO’s solutions, placing us among the world’s top 100 software companies by revenue. We help many of the world’s largest banks, insurers, retailers, telecommunications providers and other firms reach a new level of success. Our success is dependent on really talented people – just like you – who thrive on the collaboration and innovation that’s nurtured by a diverse and inclusive environment. We’ll provide the support you need, while ensuring you have the freedom to develop your skills and grow your career. Join FICO and help change the way business thinks!
   

  

 Learn more about how you can fulfil your potential at www.fico.com/Careers
   

  

 FICO promotes a culture of inclusion and seeks to attract a diverse set of candidates for each job opportunity. We are an equal employment opportunity employer and we’re proud to offer employment and advancement opportunities to all candidates without regard to race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, pregnancy, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity or Veteran status. Research has shown that women and candidates from underrepresented communities may not apply for an opportunity if they don’t meet all stated qualifications. While our qualifications are clearly related to role success, each candidate’s profile is unique and strengths in certain skill and/or experience areas can be equally effective. If you believe you have many, but not necessarily all, of the stated qualifications we encourage you to apply.
   

  

 Information submitted with your application is subject to the FICO Privacy policy at https://www.fico.com/en/privacy-policy

title: Senior QA Engineer
description:
As a Senior QA Engineer reporting to Director - Quality Assurance, you’ll play a critical role in ensuring the quality, reliability, and performance of our trading platform. You’ll contribute directly to successful customer onboarding by validating system integrations, executing non-functional and performance testing, and driving continuous improvement across our QA practices.
   

  

 You’ll thrive in this role if you are analytical, collaborative, and technically curious—someone who can independently drive quality outcomes while working seamlessly across cross‑functional teams. A passion for delivering high‑performing enterprise software, strengthening integration processes, and elevating customer experience will help you excel in this fast‑paced, high‑impact environment.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Lead and evaluate complex technical scenarios across distributed trading systems, assess risks, and make informed decisions that balance delivery speed, product quality, and compliance expectations.
* Design, develop, and maintain high‑quality automation, test tooling, and frameworks using modern programming languages, contributing directly to the technical foundation of onboarding and system validation.
* Work hands‑on with Linux‑based environments, including shell scripting, networking fundamentals, system performance analysis, and troubleshooting across hardware, containerized, and server‑side components.
* Plan, execute, and continuously improve non‑functional testing—including performance, scalability, stability, and failover—while maintaining robust and scalable automation integrated into CI/CD pipelines and tools such as qTest, Jira, and AWS.
* Collaborate and influence cross‑functional teams to drive large‑scale quality initiatives, champion best practices, and strengthen engineering excellence across the organization.


**Required Qualifications**
* Strong analytical and problem‑solving skills.
* Proficiency in programming and Linux environments, including shell scripting, troubleshooting, and working with version control systems such as Git.
* Solid understanding of networking fundamentals, system design, infrastructure components, and hands‑on experience with cloud platforms (AWS or similar), Kubernetes, and Helm.
* Experience with functional and non‑functional testing methodologies.
* Excellent collaboration and communication skills, supported by a degree in Computer Science/Engineering (or related field), and a strong curiosity for financial technology and the trading domain.


 This position will be located in Stockholm and offers the opportunity for a hybrid work environment at least 3 days a week in-office, subject to change, providing flexibility and accessibility for qualified candidates.
   

  

**Benefits & Rewards**
 We offer a competitive, well-rounded rewards package that supports you and your family - inside and outside work.
   

  

 Actual pay depends on your skills, experience, education, and location. In addition to base pay, we offer short-term incentives (bonus or commission) and long-term incentives (equity), where applicable, as well as the following benefits:
   

  

* Competitive base salary
* Annual bonus
* Annual equity grant
* Employee Stock Purchase Plan offering discounted company shares
* Pension plan
* 32 paid vacation days
* 6 additional days off per year
* Extra vacation time based on tenure
* Work from (almost) anywhere – up to 20 days/year
* Paid time off to volunteer
* Health insurance
* Sports club membership reimbursement
* 24/7 mental health support for you and your family
* Global mentoring program
* Unlimited access to e-learning platforms
* Hybrid work setup
* Modern and comfortable work environment with fresh fruit, snacks, and weekly Fika breaks


 For more information, visit Nasdaq Benefits & Rewards Career Page.
   

  

**Come as You Are**
 Nasdaq is an equal opportunity employer. We positively encourage applications from suitably qualified and eligible candidates regardless of age, color, disability, national origin, ancestry, race, religion, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity and/or expression, veteran status, genetic information, or any other status protected by applicable law.
   

  

 We will ensure that individuals with disabilities are provided reasonable accommodation to participate in the job application or interview process, to perform essential job functions, and to receive other benefits and privileges of employment. Please contact us to request an accommodation.

title: Software Engineer
description:
**Meet the Team**
 Join Cisco's Webex Media engineering site in Stockholm, where we craft the meeting experience that connects people and businesses around the world. We are a highly motivated, startup‑like team within a global organization, combining the impact and resources of Cisco with the agility and camaraderie of a smaller group. Our work powers the shift to a hybrid workforce and aims to make people feel truly connected. You’ll find a friendly, supportive environment that celebrates creativity, growth, and a shared passion for building world‑class real‑time media experiences.
   

  

**Your Impact**
* Bring new real‑time media features to life based on product requirements.
* Perform peer code reviews and automate development workflows and quality gates.
* Participate in agile ceremonies including daily stand‑ups, planning, releases, and retrospectives.
* Collaborate across teams to broaden technical and soft skills through training and mentoring.


**Minimum Qualifications**
* Hold a bachelor's degree (or equivalent) in Software Engineering or a related field.
* Proficient in C and C++ programming languages.
* Possess strong knowledge of data structures, algorithms, and design patterns.


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience with media streaming and relevant protocols for real‑time applications.
* Experience designing cross‑platform solutions using appropriate patterns and build tools.
* Experience with close‑to‑real‑time systems and performance‑sensitive code paths.


 Why Cisco?
   

  

 At Cisco, we’re revolutionizing how data and infrastructure connect and protect organizations in the AI era – and beyond. We’ve been innovating fearlessly for 40 years to create solutions that power how humans and technology work together across the physical and digital worlds. These solutions provide customers with unparalleled security, visibility, and insights across the entire digital footprint.
   

  

 Fueled by the depth and breadth of our technology, we experiment and create meaningful solutions. Add to that our worldwide network of doers and experts, and you’ll see that the opportunities to grow and build are limitless. We work as a team, collaborating with empathy to make really big things happen on a global scale. Because our solutions are everywhere, our impact is everywhere.
   

  

 We are Cisco, and our power starts with you.

title: Senior Azure Architect
description:
**Bli en del av Coop – Tillsammans gör vi mat-Sverige hållbart!** 



  


 Vill du ta ett helhetsansvar för en av Sveriges mest komplexa och affärskritiska Azure-miljöer – och samtidigt spela en nyckelroll i att forma framtidens plattform, arbetssätt och tekniska riktning?
 


  


 Vi söker nu en Senior Azure Architect som vill ta ett övergripande ansvar för vår Azure-plattform. Rollen är strategiskt viktig och tillsätts för att säkerställa kontinuitet, kvalitet och en stabil kunskapsöverföring i en miljö där arkitektur, governance och leverans är avgörande för verksamheten.
 


  


***Om tjänsten:***



  


 Som Senior Azure Architect ansvarar du för att designa, vidareutveckla och förvalta vår Azure-plattform. Du arbetar både strategiskt och hands-on, med stort inflytande över arkitektur, tekniska vägval och hur vi arbetar med molnet framåt. Rollen innebär ett nära samarbete med externa drift- och molnleverantörer samt interna team inom drift, säkerhet och utveckling. Du har ett tydligt arkitekturellt ägarskap och säkerställer att lösningar, leverans och governance håller hög kvalitet och är i linje med verksamhetens behov och tekniska riktlinjer.
 


  



**Dina ansvarsområden:** 






  

* Äga och vidareutveckla målbild, arkitekturprinciper och teknisk roadmap för Azure
* Designa, implementera och vidareutveckla Azure-lösningar inom compute, nätverk, lagring, identitet och säkerhet
* Driva och kvalitetssäkra migreringar från on-prem och hybridmiljöer till Azure
* Säkerställa att arkitektur och lösningar följer etablerade Azure-ramverk såsom Cloud Adoption Framework (CAF) och Azure Well-Architected Framework
* Arbeta aktivt med kostnadsstyrning och optimering i Azure (FinOps)
* Säkerställa finansiell transparens kopplat till Azure, inklusive budget, prognoser och uppföljning
* Vara teknisk rådgivare i projekt, förändringar och större initiativ
* Samverka med externa leverantörer kring arkitektur, design, implementation och drift
* Bidra till dokumentation, standardisering och kunskapsöverföring för att minska personberoende risker


  


***Vem är du?***



  


 För att lyckas i rollen som Senior Azure Architect tror vi att du är en trygg, strukturerad och ansvarstagande person som trivs i komplexa miljöer med många parallella initiativ.
 


  


 Du har en stark förmåga att arbeta strukturerat, prioritera rätt och skapa ordning även när förutsättningarna förändras. Du kan skilja på vad som är viktigt och vad som är bråttom och är bekväm med att fatta beslut även när all information inte är komplett.
 


  


 Som person är du kommunikativ och prestigelös, med lätt för att bygga förtroendefulla samarbeten över team- och organisationsgränser. Du tar ansvar för helheten, är lösningsorienterad och har en stark vilja att få saker gjorda – utan att tumma på kvalitet, säkerhet eller långsiktighet.
 


  


 Rollen kräver att du kan hantera en stor mängd arbetsuppgifter parallellt och göra medvetna prioriteringar utifrån verksamhetens behov, risk och affärsnytta.
 


  


**För att vara framgångsrik i rollen ser vi gärna att du har:** 



  

* Flera års erfarenhet av arkitektur och implementation i Microsoft Azure
* Djup teknisk förståelse för Azure core services, nätverk, identitet och säkerhetsarkitektur
* Erfarenhet av hybridmiljöer och molnmigrering
* Vana att arbeta med arkitekturprinciper, governance och standardisering
* Erfarenhet av automation och Infrastructure as Code (Terraform, Bicep eller ARM)
* God förståelse för FinOps och kostnadsstyrning i Azure
* Mycket god svenska och engelska i tal och skrift


  


**Meriterande:** 



  

* Microsoft-certifieringar, exempelvis Azure Solutions Architect Expert
* Erfarenhet av DevOps-arbetssätt
* Erfarenhet från större organisationer med komplex leverantörsstruktur
* Erfarenhet av identitet, åtkomststyrning (IAM) och säkerhetsdesign i molnmiljöer


  


***Vårt erbjudande till dig:***



  


 Det här är en möjlighet för dig som vill ha ett verkligt arkitektansvar, arbeta i en komplex och affärskritisk miljö, påverka tekniska vägval och samarbeta nära verksamhet och leverantörer i en roll med stort förtroende.
 


  


 Vi erbjuder dig en arbetsplats där du får möjlighet att växa och utvecklas i en inkluderande och inspirerande kultur. Hos oss på Coop blir du en del av ett engagerat team som bidrar till en mer hållbar framtid. Vi arbetar från kontoret tre dagar i veckan och erbjuder flexibilitet resterande dagar. Vi erbjuder konkurrenskraftiga förmåner och en god balans mellan arbete och fritid.
 


  


**Så ansöker du:**
 Låter detta som din nästa utmaning? Skicka in din ansökan så snart som möjligt, då vi arbetar löpande med urval och intervjuer.
 


  


 Om du har några frågor om tjänsten är du varmt välkommen att kontakta rekryterande ledare Tomas Rindå på e-postadress: tomas.rinda@coop.se
